description: Seeking 2–3 PhD students to join SEAL starting Fall 2027. Areas: multilingual NLP, AI safety, information integrity, algorithmic fairness. Strong preference for candidates with backgrounds in NLP, ML, HCI, computational linguistics, or related fields. International applicants encouraged.
howToApply: Apply to the CU Boulder Computer Science PhD program and mention SEAL / Jason Lucas in your statement. Email a CV to jason.lucas@colorado.edu before submitting.

description: Open call for postdoctoral researchers in multilingual AI safety, adversarial ML, or socio-technical evaluation. Two-year appointment with option to extend.
howToApply: Send a CV, research statement, and 3 references to jason.lucas@colorado.edu.

description: CU Boulder undergraduates interested in research experience are welcome. Prior coursework in ML/NLP helpful but not required — motivation and consistency matter more.
howToApply: Email jason.lucas@colorado.edu with your resume and a paragraph on what draws you to SEAL's work.
